diet_description: A balanced mix of proteins, carbohydrates, and fats. Includes lean meats, whole grains, fruits, and vegetables.
Reduce sodium intake to control blood pressure. Focus on fresh foods, herbs for flavoring, and avoid processed foods.
Rich in protein for muscle building and recovery. Include chicken, fish, eggs, legumes, and dairy products.
Minimize carbohydrate intake to manage blood sugar. Focus on proteins, healthy fats, and non-starchy vegetables.
Plant-based diet excluding meat. Include beans, lentils, tofu, nuts, seeds, and dairy products.
Eliminate all gluten-containing foods. Use rice, potatoes, corn, and certified gluten-free products.
High fat, low carb diet. Focus on healthy fats, proteins, and minimal carbohydrates to enter ketosis.
Reduce saturated fats and cholesterol. Include whole grains, lean proteins, and plenty of fruits and vegetables.
Completely plant-based, no animal products. Focus on legumes, nuts, seeds, whole grains, fruits, and vegetables.
Reduce foods high in fermentable carbohydrates. Suitable for IBS management. Include rice, chicken, carrots, and bananas.
High protein intake for muscle gain. Combine with resistance training. Include chicken, fish, eggs, and legumes.
Limit purine-rich foods to reduce uric acid. Avoid red meat, organ meats, and certain seafood. Focus on vegetables and whole grains.
